title: helianthemum pilosum var. claryi
intro: Helianthemum pilosum var. claryi, also known as the rockrose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum pilosum var. claryi can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
